selection.reason: The central Publish rotation most recently documented LuminaryLabs-Publish/AetherVale at 2026-07-07T10-59-49-04-00, making LuminaryLabs-Publish/TheOpenAbove the next eligible repo in the tracked cycle.

excludedRepos.reason: Standing user rule: do not work on Cavalry of Rome.

productDirection.currentGap: Runtime behavior is balloon-first, but README.md, package.json, and src/data/campaign.config.js still preserve free-flight bird language, thermals, wind gates, pitch/bank/boost controls, and legacy FLIGHT tuning.
productDirection.recommendedDecision: Canonicalize balloon drift config, altitude bands, route objects, and route fixture snapshots before extracting host/render/physics services from src/main.js.
productDirection.recommendedVerticalSlice: TheOpenAbove Altitude Band Contract + Route Fixture Snapshot Cutover

runtimeEvidence.readme: README.md still says free-flight exploration, carving, gliding, diving, boosting, thermals, wind gates, and sky perch return.
runtimeEvidence.package: package.json still describes a standalone free-flight exploration game.
runtimeEvidence.campaignConfig: src/data/campaign.config.js still exports CAMPAIGN, WORLD, and legacy FLIGHT with thermalTarget, gateTarget, returnRadius, pitch/roll/boost fields.
runtimeEvidence.main: src/main.js owns runtime host, terrain, world objects, key state, balloon state, wind sampling, drift physics, HUD, telemetry, and GameHost snapshot.
runtimeEvidence.smoke: tests/smoke.mjs currently provides static marker coverage and should gain DOM-free route fixture smoke next.

currentImplemented: create Three.js scene, camera, renderer, lights, fog, and animation loop
generate terrain, lakes, trees, clouds, and wind ribbons
sample wind angle and wind speed
integrate buoyancy, vent, vertical damping, ceiling softness, velocity, position, altitude, and distance
update basket-follow camera and HUD telemetry
publish Nexus Engine balloon snapshot and tick event
targetProductLoop: start Meadow Lift as balloon pilot
use burner / vent to enter a named altitude band
enter meadow-perch-landing radius at valid landing altitude
show mission, progression, routeObjects, and routeFixture through HUD and GameHost
recommendedServiceLoop: evaluate route object proximity and altitude constraints
reduce ordered Meadow Lift mission state
project routeObjects, mission, progression, and routeFixture into snapshot

recommendedNextWork: Update README/package language to balloon drift.
Move live burner, vent, buoyancy, damping, ceiling, clearance, and wind constants into BALLOON_DRIFT.
Add ALTITUDE_BANDS with named low-clearance, gate-cruise, high-drift, and landing-window bands.
Add ROUTE_OBJECTS for buoyancy-gate-01, buoyancy-gate-02, buoyancy-gate-03, and meadow-perch-landing.
Add WIND_LANE_HINTS for route readability and future UI/objective hints.
Create pure route object evaluator and mission/progression reducers.
Expose local.mission, local.progression, local.routeObjects, and local.routeFixture through GameHost.
Add route fixture smoke for in-order gates, out-of-order rejection, invalid altitude rejection, landing completion, and cloud-basin unlock.
Defer host/render/physics extraction until route fixture smoke passes.
acceptanceTarget: README and package describe burner / vent / balloon drift
campaign config exports BALLOON_DRIFT, ALTITUDE_BANDS, ROUTE_OBJECTS, and WIND_LANE_HINTS
route evaluator is pure and DOM-free
altitude band resolver labels each fixture frame correctly
mission reducer completes gates only in order
out-of-order gate fixture is rejected without unlocking landing
landing completes only after gates plus valid radius/altitude
GameHost.getState().local.routeObjects exposes gate and landing status
GameHost.getState().local.routeFixture exposes last fixture assertion summary
route fixture smoke proves gate completion, invalid altitude rejection, out-of-order rejection, landing completion, and cloud-basin unlock
notes: No runtime source code changed in this pass. No local build or test run was executed.
